title: God’s Image: Disaster Warden Style Schema
description: Validation schema for AI assets utilizing the chrome-brush, vivid natural-disaster colors, and divine retribution aesthetic.

style_fidelity.description: Ensures this asset is explicitly tagged as Disaster Warden style.

chrome_technique.description: True if high-specular chrome-brush or equivalent reflective rendering is used for major surfaces.

ink_exclusion.description: True if pen, ink, crosshatching, and thin sketch lines are absent from the final image.

primary_disaster_color.description: Dominant natural-disaster color motif driving the palette and emotional tone.

specularity_index.description: Normalized index (0–1) representing the degree of chrome-like reflectivity on key forms.

warden_scale.description: Perceptual scale of the Warden entity relative to human and planetary reference frames.

silhouette_method.description: Indicates silhouettes were painted or hand-emulated, not procedurally line-rendered.

environment_tags.description: At least two environment domains prominently expressed in the asset.

warning_strings.description: On-screen or embedded textual warnings and narrative strings about environmental collapse and divine retribution.
